title: Support for victims of road traffic collisions
body: "Report investigating the support available following road traffic collisions (RTCs) in different areas of England and Wales.  The report considers:   the people affected by RTCs  the level of support currently available across England and Wales the type of support people are likely to receive the types of support that are most effective any outstanding evidence gaps   This report was carried out by Frontier Economics and SYSTRA on behalf of DfT.  "
